cases.scenario: Partial engineering notes about closing the Telegram publish loop.

entries.work_summary: Built a Telegram-first publish workflow that stores drafts and post history in MongoDB.
entries.problem_solved: The earlier flow stopped before publish and had no durable record.

cases.scenario: Notes that mention only local persistence and should not invent external systems.

entries.work_summary: Stored journal entries, drafts, and posts in MongoDB for review.
entries.outcome: A usable memory layer for the Telegram workflow.
